programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: Friends S6 5
programme.desc: Joey pretends to be the owner of a Porsche whose owner left his keys at Central Perk. Rachel and Ross get divorced. Chandler and Monica babysit Phoebe's triplets.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 10
programme.desc: Michael wows mall shoppers with snakes that soothe and spiders that stitch, and at an art supply store, a woman finds out that she's a natural-born wood whittler. Plus, an abandoned house won't let go of its precious things.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 11
programme.desc: At a yard sale, Michael helps a man realize his amazing mind powers and shocks a college student by discovering she's the heir to the entire lot. Later, an art gallery's tribal mask goes missing and has the security guard fearing war!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 2
programme.desc: Gentlemen, start your engines! We've got a motorcade of 20 of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding and an extreme case of Russian road rage. Along for the ride is our celebrity castincluding Judy Gold, Danny Bonaduce, Kevin McCaffrey and Billy Kimball.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: Friends S6 4
programme.desc: Injured Joey must get an acting part in order to qualify for health insurance. Rachel finally learns the truth about her marriage to Ross.

programme.title: Friends S6 5
programme.desc: Joey pretends to be the owner of a Porsche whose owner left his keys at Central Perk. Rachel and Ross get divorced. Chandler and Monica babysit Phoebe's triplets.

programme.title: Smallville S2 12
programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
programme.desc: Stone Age Earth: In the presence of a mysterious black obelisk, pre-humans discover the use of tools--and weapons--violently taking first steps toward intelligence. 1999: On Earth's moon astronauts uncover another mysterious black obelisk. 2001: Between Earth and Jupiter, the spacecraft's intelligent computer makes a mistake that kills most of the human crew--then continues to kill to hide its error. Beyond Time: The sole survivor of the journey to Jupiter ascends to the next level of humanity.

programme.title: Smallville S2 12
programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 10
programme.desc: Michael wows mall shoppers with snakes that soothe and spiders that stitch, and at an art supply store, a woman finds out that she's a natural-born wood whittler. Plus, an abandoned house won't let go of its precious things.

programme.title: The West Wing S1 12
programme.desc: The President is ill before the State of the Union Address.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 6
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and more plague those competing for a shot at the prize.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 5
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout. Andall bets are off when a bidding war over endangered species taxidermy ends in a heated stand-off with the local authorities.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 7
programme.desc: A deceptive ninja faces off with royalty for one of two spots left in the Tournament of Champions.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 3
programme.desc: Pull back the curtain on 20 of the dumbest performers ever to take the stage - from an angry Elmo to a lion trainer who almost becomes dinner and a woman who crushes watermelons. They all get harsh reviews from celebrities like Danny Bonaduce and Leif Garrett, plus hot comics like Mike Trainor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 12
programme.desc: While doing scientific research, Michael makes things heavy with some otherworldly air. Then, at a bakery, the new rolls are so light, they defy gravity. And as a golf instructor, Michael gets caught by the ultimate sand trap!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 13
programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait and tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo, and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: It's a day of games & fun! The crew builds a crazy golf course & has a silly sandcastle competition!

programme.title: Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: It's construction chaos! The crew builds a house upside down & finds dinosaur bones in a roundabout!

programme.title: Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: Let's play the best games with KiiYii! They play Red Light Green Light, Snakes & Ladders & Marco Polo!

programme.title: When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Everything goes hilariously wrong! Robot gets stuck in jelly & Princess Cat's castle fills with bubbles!

programme.title: A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: It's an ocean clean-up day! Super Shark recycles rubbish & the family builds a ball pit from recycled items!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Learn gentle lessons with Twinkle! She learns about healthy fruit, animal sounds & sings sleepy songs!

programme.title: A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: It's a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! She learns about cloud shapes & makes the moon sneeze stardust!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a day in the life of JJ! He goes on a beach trip, brings Bingo to school & feeds baby animals!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Bedtime Stories & Fun!
programme.desc: It's bedtime fun! JJ has a slumber party, helps find 5 little ducks & sings "Happy and You Know It"!

programme.title: Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: It's a pirate adventure! JJ plays pirates on the high seas, builds a sandcastle & hunts for hidden treasure!

programme.title: A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods face their fears! Jeff fakes being sick & Fuse is scared of a spider & some spooky noises!

programme.title: Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods have unexpected problems! Jeff meets a messy guest & Lulu finds a mysterious egg that cracks!

programme.title: A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's a busy day at the garage! Gecko fixes a fire hose, washes a muddy Baby Truck & does a quiet wheel change!

programme.title: Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an awesome Baby Truck adventure! She gets a boo boo in the park & pretends to be a rocket in outer space!

programme.title: Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: Let's all help each other on the farm! The friends build a bird feeder, cheer up a sad horse & share veggies!

programme.title: A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a super fun day on the farm! Ella plays "Mummy Duck," learns animal sounds & adopts a cat!

programme.title: Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's play & learn outside with JJ! He visits Grandpa's farm, takes care of pets & plays soccer!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Family Adventures
programme.desc: Nina has family adventures! She visits a petting zoo, races her brother & learns about planes from Dad!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ learns that sharing is caring! He shares snacks with siblings, plays baseball & makes rainbow popsicles!

programme.title: Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: It's Jill's super creative adventure! She decorates a dress & makes her shoes sparkle with stickers!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Safety & Fun!
programme.desc: It's safety & fun with siblings! The kids learn not to sneak candy, clean up toys & act out "Humpty Dumpty"!

programme.title: Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: Let's get curious & creative! The mysterious Curiosity Crew appears & Blippi learns to mix colors with them!

programme.title: An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi's on an animal adventure! He learns why squirrels bury nuts, how bats see & how ducks float!

programme.title: Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's inventions are going haywire! The smart house has a tantrum & a time machine creates a pterodactyl!

programme.title: Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: It's sci-fi mayhem! Arpo gets stuck in zero gravity mode & accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Growing Up Together!
programme.desc: JJ is growing up with his siblings! He learns to save money, makes shadow puppets & gets a big kid bed!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: It's creative play fun! JJ does science experiments, makes a PB&J sandwich & plays "The Floor is Lava"!

programme.title: JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's JJ's ultimate pretend play day! He becomes a detective, a brave knight & the captain of a pirate ship!

programme.title: Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle battle evil robots & race villains! They stop a faulty Robofreeze & a cheating Winston!

programme.title: A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle welcome new Magic Pets! They meet a pet that grows jungles & one that makes juice pops!

programme.title: Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of game day goofs & Grandma's fixes! A basketball game goes wrong & Grandma helps fix a bus!

programme.title: From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Gecko's on epic adventures, from saving Grandma at a waterfall to launching a spaceship to the moon!

programme.title: A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a big day of fun & learning! Mia & Max go on a train ride, learn shapes & sing on the big red bus!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia plays "Ten in a Bed," takes a bubble bath & goes on a rocket ride to the moon!

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster learns teamwork makes the dream work! He works with his team to win a soccer game & escape a maze!

programme.title: Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Buster is on a family adventure! He makes dinner with Grandpa, chases a kite with Daddy & goes camping!

programme.title: The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: The whole crew is to the rescue! They save a stranded Blue, help Kat in an out-of-control car & make a beach!

programme.title: Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has creative fixes for funny feelings! He cheers up a sad Fiona & paints a bus to help an anxious Mech!

programme.title: Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: Learn healthy habits on the farm! Ella learns to wash her hands, eat veggies & how to recycle!

programme.title: Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: Let's sing, dance & play on the farm! The friends learn the ABCs, dance & have a splash competition!

programme.title: A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: It's a special day for Jill! She makes a new friend at the playground & finds her talent in arts & crafts!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Cooking & Fun!
programme.desc: It's cooking & fun! The siblings plan a surprise date for parents, make a bubble machine & try ketchup!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: It's time to help out! JJ pretends to be a doctor, bakes a cake for Mom & goes on a nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: It's a dance party on the move! JJ sings "Wheels on the Bus," pretends to be a train & a brave firefighter!

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female cop moves into a small town, and gets drawn to a case that involves a girl who is possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta

programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)

programme.title: Para sa Isa't Isa ep 2
programme.desc: Zion gets another shot at repairing his relationship with his wife, Erin by a wish on a well to go back in time. But he finds Erin not knowing him at all. He must now correct his mistakes and make her fall in love with him again.
